Bash(bash -c '{ git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null; git show --name-only --format="" HEAD 2>/dev/null; } | grep -qE "src/screens/|src/components/\(ItemActionSheet|MarkDoneSheet\)" && printf "{\\"systemMessage\\": \\"guide reminder: screens or key components changed this session — does /guide need updating?\\"}\\n" || true')

Bash(bash -c 'SESSION_ID=$\(jq -r ".session_id // \\"unknown\\"" 2>/dev/null\); MARKER="/tmp/nospaces_started_${SESSION_ID}"; [ ! -f "$MARKER" ] && touch "$MARKER" && printf "{\\"hookSpecificOutput\\": {\\"hookEventName\\": \\"UserPromptSubmit\\", \\"additionalContext\\": \\"SESSION START: Read HANDOFF.md before responding — focus on the Next session priorities and Roadmap sections.\\"}}\\n" || true')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://nospaces.vercel.app/api/email?token=__TRACKED_VAR__ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"From":"Farah <farahmokhtar94@gmail.com>","Subject":"Fwd: you should watch this","TextBody":"have you seen Portrait of a Lady on Fire? the 2019 film by Celine Sciamma. incredible.","OriginalRecipient":"inbox@nospaces.xyz"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')

hooks.command:
SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); MARKER="/tmp/nospaces_started_${SESSION_ID}"; [ ! -f "$MARKER" ] && touch "$MARKER" && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "SESSION START: Read HANDOFF.md before responding — focus on the Next session priorities and Roadmap sections to orient yourself for this session."}}
' || true

{ git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null; git show --name-only --format="" HEAD 2>/dev/null; } | grep -qE 'src/screens/|src/components/(ItemActionSheet|MarkDoneSheet)|src/lib/moods\.ts' && printf '{"systemMessage": "guide reminder: screens, key components, or moods.ts changed this session — does /guide need updating?"}\n' || true

{ npx tsc --noEmit; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.api.json; } 2>&1 | grep -q 'error TS' && printf '{"systemMessage": "typecheck: TypeScript errors found — run npm run typecheck to see them."}\n' || true
